comment: [gof-patterns] Defines configuration paths for guidance system using precomputed absolute routes across project and user levels.

members.name: Provider
members.signature: keyword_struct Provider { ... }
members.comment: Manages dynamic buffer allocation with ownership and deinit lifecycle; ensures safe resource cleanup.

members.name: deinit
members.signature: fn deinit(self: *Provider, allocator: std.mem.Allocator) -> void

members.name: LintCommand
members.signature: keyword_struct LintCommand { ... }
members.comment: Per-extension test command. `{file}` is substituted for the extension "*".

members.name: deinit
members.signature: fn deinit(self: LintCommand, allocator: std.mem.Allocator) -> void

members.name: ProjectConfig
members.signature: keyword_struct ProjectConfig { ... }
members.comment: Resolved, absolute paths for a single guidance project instance.

members.name: deinit
members.signature: fn deinit(self: *ProjectConfig) -> void

members.name: infillModel
members.signature: fn infillModel(self: *const ProjectConfig) -> []const u8
members.comment: Return the model to use for comment infill: fast slot if set, else default.

members.name: thinkingModel
members.signature: fn thinkingModel(self: *const ProjectConfig) -> []const u8
members.comment: Return the model to use for thinking/reasoning tasks (module detail generation).

members.name: getProvider
members.signature: fn getProvider(self: *const ProjectConfig, name: []const u8) -> ?Provider
members.comment: Find a provider by name. Returns null if not found.

members.name: parseModelRef
members.signature: fn parseModelRef(model_ref: []const u8) -> ?struct { provider: []const u8, model: []const u8 }
members.comment: Parse a model reference like "local:code:latest" into (provider_name, model_name).

members.name: resolveModelUrl
members.signature: fn resolveModelUrl(self: *const ProjectConfig, allocator: std.mem.Allocator, model_ref: []const u8) -> ?struct { url: []const u8, provider: Provider, is_thinking_endpoint: bool }
members.returns: ?struct { url: []const u8, provider: Provider, is_thinking_endpoint: bool }
members.comment: Resolve a model reference to its provider and full API URL.

members.name: isThinkingModelRef
members.signature: fn isThinkingModelRef(self: *const ProjectConfig, model_ref: []const u8) -> bool
members.comment: Return true when `model_ref` requires the Ollama thinking API.

members.name: lintCommandForExt
members.signature: fn lintCommandForExt(self: *const ProjectConfig, ext: []const u8) -> ?[]const []const u8
members.comment: Return the lint argv template for `ext`, or null if none is configured.

members.name: fmtCommandForExt
members.signature: fn fmtCommandForExt(self: *const ProjectConfig, ext: []const u8) -> ?[]const []const u8
members.comment: Return the format argv template for `ext`, or null if none is configured.

members.name: loadConfig
members.signature: fn loadConfig(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, cwd: []const u8) -> ProjectConfig
members.comment: Load project configuration with the two-level fallback chain.

members.name: initConfig
members.signature: fn initConfig(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, cwd: []const u8, options: InitOptions) -> bool
members.comment: Create a default configuration file at `{cwd}/{guidance_dir}/{CONFIG_FILENAME}`.

members.name: generateAgentsMdContent
members.signature: fn generateAgentsMdContent(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, guidance_dir: []const u8) -> []const u8
members.comment: Generate AGENTS.md content for guidance integration.

members.name: parseCommandsObject
members.signature: fn parseCommandsObject(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, obj: std.json.ObjectMap) -> []LintCommand
members.comment: Parse a commands object (lint_commands, fmt_commands, test_commands) into LintCommand array.

members.name: tryLoadFile
members.signature: fn tryLoadFile(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, cwd: []const u8, path: []const u8) -> ProjectConfig
members.comment: Attempts to load a file into a project configuration, returning the loaded settings or an error.

members.name: buildDefault
members.signature: fn buildDefault(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, cwd: []const u8) -> ProjectConfig
members.comment: Constructs a default project configuration from an allocator and CWD input.

members.name: buildFromParts
members.signature: fn buildFromParts(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, cwd: []const u8, guidance_dir_rel: []const u8, db_path_rel: []const u8, capabilities_dir: []const u8, embedding_provider: []const u8, embedding_model: []const u8, embedding_dims: u32, src_dirs: []const []const u8, providers: []const Provider, model_default: []const u8, model_fast: []const u8, model_thinking: []const u8, test_commands: []const LintCommand, lint_commands: []const LintCommand, fmt_commands: []const LintCommand, embedding_cache_limit: u32) -> ProjectConfig
members.comment: Constructs a project configuration from Zig source parts using allocator and path data.

members.name: makeTestConfig
members.signature: fn makeTestConfig(allocator: std.mem.Allocator, model_thinking: []const u8) -> ProjectConfig
members.comment: Build a minimal ProjectConfig for unit-testing `isThinkingModelRef`.

members.name: isThinkingModelRef: same model, different provider alias
isThinkingModelRef: different model — not a thinking ref
isThinkingModelRef: empty thinking slot — always false
isThinkingModelRef: bare model ref (no provider prefix) — not treated as thinking
